title: More capability for @mentions

Description
Make it possible to @mention People columns (Item and Subitem) in updates, so I could for example say “@Owners” or “@QA” column and notify all relevant people

posts.author: GeorgeKonstam (George Konstam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Make it possible to @mention People columns (Item and Subitem) in updates, so I could for example say “@Owners” or “@QA” column and notify all relevant people

What are you trying to achieve

Faster and more accurate mass updates
